title: Smile Today — engineer retry (300s first-token timeout)

spec.label: engineer
spec.prompt:
Implement 'Smile Today' as a single static web app — no framework, no build step.

For every file, output a fenced code block whose FIRST line is a comment with the file path:
  - HTML: `<!-- index.html -->`
  - CSS: `/* style.css */`
  - JS: `// script.js` and `// sw.js`
  - SVG: `<!-- logo.svg -->`
  - JSON: `<!-- manifest.json -->` then the JSON

Files, in order: index.html, style.css, script.js, logo.svg, manifest.json, sw.js, robots.txt.

Design tokens (use VERBATIM):
```css
:root {
  --bg: #ffffff; --fg: #0a0a0a; --accent: #ff5a4e;
  --muted: rgba(10,10,10,.55); --border: rgba(10,10,10,.08); --shadow: rgba(10,10,10,.08);
  --space-xs: 4px; --space-sm: 8px; --space-md: 16px; --space-lg: 24px; --space-xl: 32px;
  --radius-sm: 4px; --radius-md: 8px; --radius-lg: 16px; --radius-full: 9999px;
}
```

Logo SVG (use VERBATIM in logo.svg):
```svg
<svg viewBox="0 0 240 240" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Smile Today">
  <rect width="240" height="240" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <text x="120" y="105" font-family="Fraunces, Georgia, serif" font-size="42" font-weight="400" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0a0a0a">Smile</text>
  <text x="120" y="155" font-family="Fraunces, Georgia, serif" font-size="42" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0a0a0a">Today</text>
  <path d="M 85 172 Q 120 165, 155 172" stroke="#ff5a4e" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
```

Fonts: Google Fonts — Fraunces (display, weights 300 400 500) + Inter (body, weights 400 500 600).

On-screen copy (use VERBATIM):
  Headline: 'Smile at someone today.'
  Sub-headline: 'A small kindness, every hour.'
  Permission CTA: 'Allow gentle reminders'
  Permission pre-prompt: 'Smile Today would like to send you a small reminder every hour. No tracking, no accounts — just a nudge.'
  Timer label: 'Next smile in'
  Primary button (idle): 'I smiled'
  Primary button (post-tap, 1.5s): 'Thank you.'
  Settings: 'Remind me every', 'Quiet until morning', 'Soft chime', 'Forget my streak'
  Footer: 'Made quietly. No accounts, no tracking.'

10 rotating quotes (one per cycle):
  1. A smile costs nothing and warms two people at once.
  2. Look up. Someone near you needs to be seen.
  3. The shortest distance between two strangers is a smile.
  4. Be the soft thing in someone's hard day.
  5. Your face is a gift. Give it freely.
  6. Kindness is a muscle. Use it now.
  7. Somewhere, someone is waiting to be smiled at.
  8. A real smile travels further than any word.
  9. You will never regret being the warm one.
  10. The world is quieter when you remember to smile.

localStorage keys (smile.* prefix): intervalMinutes (number, 60), nextSmileAt (number, now+3600000), streakCount (number, 0), lastSmileDate (string YYYY-MM-DD, ''), quietUntilMorning (boolean, false), soundEnabled (boolean, true), permissionAsked (boolean, false), lastQuoteIndex (number, -1), installedAt (number, Date.now() on first load).

Requirements:
  - Web Notifications API permission flow with the exact pre-prompt copy above (in-app sentence shown before browser request).
  - Hourly setInterval scheduler in script.js + Service Worker (sw.js) for hidden-tab notifications. Register sw.js from script.js.
  - Settings: interval slider 15 min – 4 h (default 60), 'Quiet until morning' toggle (suppresses notifications between 22:00 and 07:00), 'Soft chime' toggle. Persisted to localStorage.
  - Streak counter (days in a row) with daily granularity.
  - Web Audio API short chime (no audio files).
  - Smooth fade-ins, countdown colon pulse (1s ease-in-out), post-tap ripple (800ms).
  - Mobile responsive. PWA manifest: name 'Smile Today', short_name 'Smile', start_url '/', display 'standalone', theme_color '#ff5a4e', background_color '#ffffff'.
  - prefers-reduced-motion respected (disable animations).
  - robots.txt: User-agent: * / Allow: /

No TODO, no placeholders. Output a working app on first load.
